title: Nidôsh
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''nidôsh''' was the [[Koruun|Korunnal]] word for "clan-child," which could also be translated as orphan. If a child's parents were killed before their naming day, the child would become a nidôsh, and take the name of his [[ghôsh]] as his own. [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] and [[Nick Rostu]] were both nidôsh.

==Appearances==
